title: assertion on shutdown
body:
### Issue Description

On shutting down an container podman asserts

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman run --rm  --name mcs docker.io/mariadb/columnstore
2. ctrl-\ (SIGQUIT) on console
